away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Sabrina Ionescu
players.injury_comment: Ionescu will remain sidelined for a seventh consecutive contest due to back soreness, though she's been participating in 5-on-5 work and is making good progress, per Madeline Kenney of the New York Post. With the star guard remaining out, Pauline Astier will likely continue seeing an increased role.

players.name: Anneli Maley
players.injury_comment: Maley has appeared in three games so far this season while on a developmental contract, so the Liberty will sit her down Thursday in an effort to preserve her eligibility. Her next chance to play will arrive Sunday against the Mystics.

injuries.name: Anneli Maley

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Brionna Jones
players.injury_comment: Jones was spotted getting some shots up after Thursday's morning shootaround. She's reportedly making good progress, but a timetable has yet to be established. The Dream are planning to be "very smart" with her return, Copeland adds.

players.name: Amy Okonkwo
players.injury_comment: The Dream are preserving Okonkwo's eligibility under a developmental contract. Her next chance to play comes Sunday in Toronto.

injuries.name: Amy Okonkwo
